title: malus coronaria var. platycarpa
intro: Malus coronaria var. platycarpa, also known as the Chinese crabapple, is a variety of flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its showy flowers and edible fruit. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malus coronaria var. platycarpa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's fruit and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
